//: GENERATED from src/lib/agent-collection-schema.ts + src/contracts/metrics.ts — do not edit; run npm run generate:desktop-allowlist

fields.label: AI app in use
fields.purpose: The desktop app checks which known AI desktop apps are open (from a fixed list) and sends only each app's name as a label — never its windows, files, or anything you type in it.

fields.label: Content block type
fields.purpose: Only the TYPE of a content block is inspected (e.g. tool-result vs text) — the block's contents are never read.

fields.label: Sidechain flag
fields.purpose: Distinguishes your sessions from subagent work so session counts stay honest. A boolean, counted only.

fields.label: Model id
fields.purpose: The model id (e.g. claude-…) is sent as a metric label, sanitized to a safe charset and length.

fields.label: Request / message id
fields.purpose: De-duplicates streamed reply lines so usage isn't double-counted. Used on-device; never transmitted.

fields.label: Session id
fields.purpose: Groups lines into sessions and measures overlap on your machine. The id itself never leaves.

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.purpose: Bucketed on your machine to a calendar day and an hour-of-day histogram. The exact time never leaves — only the day and coarse hour counts do.

fields.label: Tool-result marker
fields.purpose: Presence-only: marks a line as tool output so it isn't miscounted as a prompt. The tool output itself is never read.

fields.label: Record type
fields.purpose: Whether a line is an assistant reply, a prompt, or activity — counted, never its text.

fields.label: Cache-write tokens
fields.purpose: The cache-write-token count is summed per day and sent as a number.

fields.label: Cache-read tokens
fields.purpose: The cache-read-token count is summed per day and sent as a number.

fields.label: Input tokens
fields.purpose: The input-token count is summed per day and sent as a number.

fields.label: Output tokens
fields.purpose: The output-token count is summed per day and sent as a number.

fields.label: Line uuid
fields.purpose: Fallback de-duplication key when no request id is present. Read on-device only.
